personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Senior Front End Engineer | React & Next.js
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Product-focused Front-End Engineer specializing in React 19, Next.js 15, and TypeScript. Expert in building highly interactive, accessible interfaces with 90+ Lighthouse scores, integrating complex browser APIs (Web Audio, WebRTC) for native-like web experiences.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Free access to the EU job market.

experience.title: Front End Web Developer
responsibilities: Enterprise UI Development: Built and deployed production-ready web applications from scratch using Next.js and React, while developing new interactive features for existing enterprise dashboards.
System Migration: Spearheaded the migration of legacy views into modular, reusable Next.js components, establishing a scalable and accessible frontend architecture.
State & Performance: Implemented strict state management (Zustand) and caching strategies, significantly reducing client-side rendering bottlenecks in large-scale applications.
Conversion Optimization: Collaborated directly with UX/UI designers to implement responsive design patterns, increasing mobile usability and engagement metrics.

experience.title: Freelance Front-End Engineer
responsibilities: Developed highly responsive, client-facing interfaces using React 19 and Next.js 15, consistently achieving 90+ Lighthouse performance scores across three production-grade SaaS platforms.
Integrated Web MediaRecorder API for real-time voice processing and applied custom interactive DOM transformations (ePub.js) for immersive reading experiences.
Engineered optimistic UI updates via TanStack Query and built complex, interactive data visualizations using Chart.js and Framer Motion.
Authored comprehensive E2E test suites using Playwright, including custom auth-bypass mechanisms to streamline CI/CD pipelines.
Built Lexity MVP and Interly MVP from scratch for B2B clients using Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL.

experience.title: Junior Front End Web Developer
responsibilities: Front-End Development: Contributed to web application development in agile teams, learning React fundamentals and modern JavaScript.
Integration & Debug: Layout implementation, cross-browser debugging and responsive interface development.

education.institution: Minsk State Higher College of Radiotechnics
